name: citedbyai-mcp-server
displayName: CPS® Lite by Cited By AI
description: Free AI citation readiness checker powered by Cited By AI's CPS® framework. Instantly scores any website 0-100 across structured data, meta tags, content quality, technical config, and AI signals. Returns a grade (A-F) and the top issues blocking AI citation in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Copilot. No auth required.

tools.name: get_aeo_score
tools.description: Get a quick AI citation readiness score for any website. Returns grade (A-F), score (0-100), and top 3 issues blocking AI citation. Powered by Cited By AI's CPS® framework.

tools.name: analyze_aeo
tools.description: Full AI visibility audit across 5 dimensions: structured data, meta tags, content quality, technical config, and AI signals. Returns complete issues list and prioritised recommendations.

tools.name: check_ai_readiness
tools.description: Check whether a website is properly configured for AI crawler access. Checks robots.txt for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot blocks, llms.txt presence, and other AI visibility signals.
